headline: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Prices Rise Again; AI Chip Giant Broadcom Jumps
summary: The stock market rallied Wednesday but the major indexes are still below their 50-day lines. Broadcom earnings topped views late.

headline: HCA Florida Expansion Adds Emergency Capacity And Supports Valuation Debate
summary: HCA Florida University Hospital has opened a new emergency care center in Pembroke Pines. The facility expands HCA Healthcare's reach in South Florida and adds emergency capacity for local residents. This move aligns with HCA Healthcare's broader build out of community healthcare infrastructure. For investors tracking HCA Healthcare, NYSE:HCA, the new Pembroke Pines emergency center adds another brick to the company’s physical network in a key growth state. The stock recently closed at...
